title: Residual effects of legumes in rice and wheat cropping systems of the Indo-Gangetic plain: proceedings of the Workshop, ICRISAT Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, India, 26-28 August 1996
abstract: The book which is the product of the workshop, contains11 papers grouped under the following themes: Biological nitrogen fixation and residual effects of legumes; management of legumes; prospects of legumes in rice and wheat cropping systems.
